highlights.headline: Anaheim Ducks vs. Ottawa Senators: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Anaheim Ducks vs. Ottawa Senators: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NHL_One-Play (Anaheim Ducks vs. Ottawa Senators: Game Highlights) 2026/03/14 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Linus Ullmark made 23 saves for his second shutout of the season and the Ottawa Senators blanked the Anaheim Ducks 2-0 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ullmark earns second shutout of the season as Senators blank Ducks 2-0

highlights.description: Bruins take down the Capitals in a shootout

tracking.trackingName: COM_NHL Highlight (Bruins take down the Capitals in a shootout) 2026/03/14 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Charlie McAvoy scored twice and Fraser Minten had the shootout winner as the Boston Bruins beat the Washington Capitals 3-2 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Minten scores in 9th round of the shootout as the Bruins beat the Capitals 3-2

tracking.trackingName: NHL_One-Play (Colorado Avalanche vs. Winnipeg Jets: Game Highlights) 2026/03/14 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Kyle Connor reached 30 goals for a franchise-record eighth time and added an assist, Connor Hellebuyck made 28 saves and the Winnipeg Jets beat the NHL-leading Colorado Avalanche 3-1 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kyle Connor reaches 30 goals for 8th time to help the Jets beat the Avalanche 3-1

headlines.description: — Igor Shesterkin made 46 saves and Vladislav Gavrikov had a goal and two assists as the New York Rangers extended their winning streak to four games with a 4-2 win over the Minnesota Wild on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shesterkin makes 46 saves to help the Rangers to a 4-2 win over the Wild

events.name: Toronto Maple Leafs at Buffalo Sabres

headlines.description: — Jack Quinn scored the tying goal and also connected in a shootout, Alex Tuch ended the tiebreaker and the Buffalo Sabres beat the Toronto Maple Leafs 3-2 on Saturday night to rebound from their first loss since the Olympic break.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jack Quinn scores in regulation and shootout in the Sabres' 3-2 win over the Maple Leafs
